context_updates.last_response: Fixed the first error class in `tests/integration/smoke_test.go` by correcting the `go build` package path in `TestMain` to point at the actual module-relative command directory (`../../cmd/agent`) instead of the invalid import-like path `agent/cmd/agent`.
